title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits · Runtime Contract: Repeated Field Combination
summary: A parser stores one value per name, splits every comma, accepts obsolete folding, merges Set-Cookie, and treats all field values as trusted UTF-8 text. Planned artifact: Add and verify the repeated field combination increment in loss-aware bounded field-section model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve field-line order and repeated values, combining only when that field definition permits it.
Parse case-insensitive token field names, colon delimiters, optional field whitespace, and field values while rejecting whitespace before the colon.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Repeated Field Combination · Theory Repeated Field Combination
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 9426 in a regional status service with slow assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic Go evidence to preserve repeated field lines and reject sections beyond a bounded policy; preserve this operating constraint: a timeout must reserve cleanup time and retain the terminal phase; then truncate one content octet and classify incomplete framing without connection reuse. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
